title: Migrate API Keys from Client-Side to Edge Functions
problem: The .env file exposes VITE_GROQ_API_KEY and VITE_OPENAI_API_KEY as client-side environment variables. Critical security vulnerability.
approach: Create Supabase Edge Functions as API proxies. Move secret keys to server-side only. Implement rate limiting.
why_build: Exposed API keys in client-side JS is a stop-ship vulnerability — anyone can extract keys from the bundle and drain your OpenAI/Groq accounts, causing unlimited financial loss.

title: Fix Credit System Race Conditions
problem: Credit deduction happens client-side before API call. Users can manipulate this. No idempotency key for story generation.
approach: Move credit deduction to server-side edge function. Add database transaction with SELECT FOR UPDATE. Add idempotency keys.
why_build: Client-side credit deduction means savvy users can bypass payment entirely and generate unlimited free stories — that's direct revenue leakage. Low effort (2) with massive ROI.

title: Fix Critical SEO & Accessibility Issues
problem: Landing page uses <h3> instead of <h1>, no heading hierarchy, missing keywords. E2E audit scored 66%.
approach: Fix heading hierarchy, add semantic HTML with target keywords, add aria-labels, implement JSON-LD schema.
why_build: SEO is the primary organic acquisition channel. Broken headings and missing keywords mean Google is actively penalizing discoverability — every day is lost signups.

title: Fix Authentication Memory Leaks and Race Conditions
problem: Memory leak in ClerkAuthContext.tsx (useEffect lacks cleanup) and race conditions in user profile sync.
approach: Add AbortController, proper cleanup, useRef flags, React Query caching.
why_build: Auth memory leaks cause crashes and stale data — users who can't stay logged in can't buy credits. Silently kills conversion at critical funnel step.

title: Add Analytics and Funnel Tracking
problem: No proper analytics. Can't track conversion funnel: landing → signup → credit purchase → story generation.
approach: Add PostHog or Plausible. Track key events: pageview, signup, credit purchase, story generation.
why_build: Can't optimize what you can't measure. Without funnel tracking, every other improvement is a guess.

title: Optimize Bundle Size (Currently 2.1MB+)
problem: Production bundle is 2.1MB+ (target 500KB). Slow load times hurt mobile teen users.
approach: Code splitting, replace framer-motion with CSS animations, lazy load dependencies.
why_build: 2.1MB on mobile is brutal for teens on throttled data. Every 100ms costs ~1% conversion.

title: Implement Error Boundaries and Recovery
problem: No React error boundaries. Single component crash takes down entire app.
approach: Add ErrorBoundary components, retry logic with exponential backoff, fallback UI.
why_build: White-screen crashes during story generation feels like money stolen. Low effort makes this quick win.

title: Implement Proper Test Coverage (Currently <5%)
problem: Only handful of test files. Critical paths — auth, payment, credit deduction — have zero coverage.
approach: Set up MSW, write unit tests for credit deduction, billing, write integration tests.
why_build: Zero test coverage on payment paths means every deploy is a gamble — one bad merge could silently break billing.

title: Add Real-Time Collaboration Features
problem: Single-user focused. No way to share stories with friends. Missed viral loop.
approach: Add Supabase real-time subscriptions, share links, friend list, collaborative voting.
why_build: Social sharing is strongest viral loop for teen products. Build after core is stable.

title: Implement Offline Mode with Service Worker
problem: No service worker. No offline support. Teens have spotty connectivity at school/venues.
approach: Add Vite PWA plugin with workbox, cache assets, offline queue.
why_build: Story generation requires server-side AI anyway — core value can't work offline.
